name: googledrive_search_files
description: Search for files in Google Drive using advanced query syntax. You can search by name, content, file type, date ranges, and more. This is useful for finding specific documents or files matching certain criteria.

q.description: Query string for searching files. Examples: 'name contains "report"', 'fullText contains "budget"', 'mimeType contains "application/pdf"', 'modifiedTime > "2023-01-01"'

pageSize.description: Maximum number of files to return

pageToken.description: Token for pagination to get next page of results

fields.default: nextPageToken, files(id, name, mimeType, size, createdTime, modifiedTime, parents, webViewLink)
fields.description: Fields to include in the response

includeItemsFromAllDrives.description: Whether both My Drive and shared drive items should be included in results

supportsAllDrives.description: Whether the requesting application supports both My Drives and shared drives

response_transformer.description: Transform Google Drive search API response to standardized format
